title: Policy summary for LLM agent v0.1
description: What the agent can see: allowed_actions, zone graph, queue_head, pending_criticals.

allowed_actions.description: Action types the agent is allowed to propose (RBAC-filtered)

zone_graph.description: Adjacency: zone_id -> list of reachable zone_ids

key_constraints.description: Minimal list of key constraints (e.g. no release when log_frozen)

critical_ladder_summary.description: Critical result escalation ladder summary (levels, ack required)

restricted_zones.description: Zone IDs that require token for entry

token_requirements.description: Action type -> list of required token types (e.g. OPEN_DOOR -> [RESTRICTED_ENTRY])
